info.english_meaning: to kill to destroy to terminate to  finish to end
info.hindI_arTa: viDvaMsa karanA nazwa karanA nazwa honA magna honA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' zE kzaye sAyatItIzwam antakarmaRi tu syati ' (Slo. 7) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'aTa patitAH samavasAya DarmAMScareyuH' (bO0 Da0 21210) samavasAya samBUya
'aTABiSastAH samavasAya careyurDarmyam' (Apa0 Da0 110298) samavasAya=saha gfhARi kftvA avasAnaM gfhaM Bavati
'nAtyantamanvavasyet' (Apa0 Da0 16187) na tatrEva nityaM prasitaH syAdityarTaH
'tftIyArTe' (1485) iti sUtre nadImanvavasitA senA nadyA sambadDetyudAharato vfttikArasya tu anvavapUrvasya ziYa eva banDanamarTo mata iti BAti
'yaTA SrezWI svErevaM vE tamAtmAnameta AtmAno'nvavasyanti yaTA SrezWinaM svAH' (kO0 brA0 u0 420) BuYjata ityarTaH
'nAtyantamanvavasyed vfttiM prApya viramet' (satyA0 SrO0 26577) idaM paWitapUrvaM pustake arTAntaranyAsAyehAnUdyate na anvavasyet na nirantaramudyuYjIta nAtyantamAtmAnaM vyApArayedityarTaH
'paScAdanvavasAyinImevAsmE viSaM karoti' (tE0 sa0 21313) anvavasAyinI anugAminI ekamanAH
'kaTamanAlocitaH sa vizayaviSeza indriyeRa manasA'nuvyavasIyate' (yo0 sU0 347 BAzye) anuvyavasIyate=niScIyate GawamahaM jAnAmIti yajjYAnaM so'nuvyavasAyaH
'ava sya harI vi mucA saKAyA' (f0 6401) avasya avopasfzwasya avasyaterloRmaDyamEkavacane rUpam saKAyO harI vAjinO bizitO kurvityAha
'syatirupasfzwo vimocane' (ni0 117)
'avasyati hEtadyad gArhapatyaM cinoti … ya u vEke cAgnicito'syAmeva te'vasitAH' (Sa0 brA0 7111) avasyati=svasyAvasTitiM karoti
'svakfta iriRe nAvasyet' (Apa0 SrO0 57259) nAvasyet=na tizWet iriRe'tfRe
'agadaH somena paSunezwyezwvA'vasyet' (ASva0 gf0 414) avasyet gfhaM praviSya vasediti haradattaH
'yAni vA imAni pfTivyAScitrARi tAni nakzatrARi tasmAdaSlIlanAmAni citre nAvasyenna yajeta' (tE0 brA0 1526) avasyet nivasediti sAyaRaH
'AdyantayoH pfTagavasyasi maDyataSca' (BA0 pu0 7930) avasyasi=sTito Bavasi kAraRatvenAvaDitvena ca virAmaM karozIti SrIDaraH
'pratizWA vA etasya ezwavyA yaH kfzimavasyati' (kAWaka0 1712)
'SaktirmamAvasyati hInayudDe' (ki0 1617) avasyati=samAptimeti kzIyate
'vARIM kARaBUjImajIgaRadavAsAsIcca vEyAsikIm' (mallinATaH saMjIvanyA upakrame) avAsAsIt=niracinot niScitamajAnAt
'avaseyASca kAryARi DarmeRa puravAsinAm' (Bawwi0 1912) avaseyAH=jAnIyAH ASizi liNi prayogaH
'devayajana evEnaM tadavasAyayati' (E0 brA0 32) upaveSayatItyarTaH
'avasAnaM jozayet' (ASva0 ga0 272 go0 gf0 472) avasAnaM vAstu
'yamo dadAtyavasAnamasmE' (f0 10149) avasAnamAvAsaH dahanasTAnamiti sAyaRaH
'dadAmyasmA avasAnametat' (aTarva0 18237) avasyanti nivasantyatretyavasAnamAvAsasTAnam
'avasAnaM Bavatvatra' (BA0 u0 3119) avasAnaM vasatisTAnam
'dohAvasAne punareva dogDrIm' (raGu0 223) dohasyAnte dohakarmaRi pariRate sati
'tacCizyADyayananiveditAvasAnAm' (raGu0 12) avasAnaM virAmaH antaH
'avasAne'NgarAjasya yodDavyaM BavatA kila' (veRI0 539) avasAnaM niDanam
'idamucCreyo'vasAnamAgAm' (aTarva0 19141) avasyati paryAptaM Bavati prayARamatra sTAne ityavasAnam
'vimucyA vayo'vasAyASvAn' (f0 11041) avasAya=viyojya
'syatirupasfzwo vimocane' (ni0 117)
'avasitaM hasitaM prasitam' (Bawwi0 106) avasitam=samAptam=apagatam
'avasito darSanArTaH' (mAla0 2) ukto'rTaH
'navAvasite vEnamAhareyuH' (Sa0 brA0 2328) nave gfha ityAha
'SaravarzEravasAyamASrayASaH' (SiSu0 2072) avasAyaH=antaH=nASaH
'avasAyo BavizyAmi duHKasyAsya kadA nvaham' (Bawwi0 681) avasAyaH=samApakaH
'atrA yukto'vasAtAramicCAt' (f0 10279) avasAtAram=vimoktAram
'avasena vA aDvAnaM yanti' (Sa0 brA0 26217) avasaH pATeyaM paTyadanam antAvasAyI Svapace muniBede ca nApite (medinI) atrAvapUrvasya syaternivAso'rTa iti pravyaktam
'tasya sapta padAni samasyAvasyet' (SAM0 brA0 32) avasyet samAptiM kuryAt viramet
'aba syataM muYcataM yanno asti tanUzu kftameno asmat' (tE0 saM0 1822) avasyatamavasAyayataM nASayatam

'navA'vasite vA' (kA0 SrO0 4138) idaM pustake nyastacaraM BUyo vESadyAyehAnUdyate avasitaM gfham loke udavasitaM gfhamucyate taTA cAmaraH paWati--gfhaM gehodavasitam iti svAmI tu sinote rvyutpattimAha
'sAkzaraH padAnto'vasitaH' (fktantre 228) sAkzaraM samAnAkzaraM padAnto'vasito'nunAsiko BavatIti vfttiH
'yatkAmastadavasyati' (BA0 pu0 11155) tasya kAmasya parAM sImAnamaDigacCatItyarTaH

'tasmAjjyezWaM putraM Danena niravasAyayanti' (tE0 saM0 2527-8) pustake nyastacarametat punarnyasyate'rTa vESadyAya niravasAnamutkarza iti BawwaBAskaraH vyAvfttamutkarziRamaDikaDanavantaM kurvantItyarTaH
'pratizidDo'varavarRAsvaniravasitAsu' (kA0 sU0 152) ukto'rTaH pustake
'SUdrARAmaniravasitAnAm' (pA0 2410) niravasAnaM bahizkaraRam pAtrAt yErBukte pAtraM saMskAreRApi na SuDyati te niravasitA iti kASikA
'pAtrAdaniravasitAnAm' (kAmasUtre 153) niravasitAH pAtrAd bahizkftA iti jayamaNgalA
'tasmAjjyezWaM puruzaM Danena niravasAyayanti iti SrutiH' (bO0 Da0 2235 tE0 saM0 252)
'aTApi putraM Danena niravasAyayanti' (Apa0 Da0 261412) Danenopatozya pfTak kurvanti iti sarvatra samAno'rTaH
'pUzA te bilaM vizyatu' (Apa0 Da0 2261) apAvartayatvityAha
'tat (dAma) te vizyAmyAyuze' (aTarva0 6631) vizyAmi vimuYcAmi
'syatirupasfzwo vimocane' (ni0 117)
'prakfte karman vizyati' (granTim) (Sa0 brA0 26125) vizyati visraMsayati SiTilayati muYcati
'ISAno vizyA dftim' (aTarva0 7191) vizyA vizya vivfRu
'granTiM na vizya graTitaM punAna fjuM ca gAtuM vfjinaM ca soma' (f0 99718) vizya SiTilaya
'pUnAna indo vi zyA manIzAma' (f0 9955) vizyA vizya vikAsaya
'rAyaspozaM vi zyatAM nABimasme' (f0 2404) tO somApUzaRO vizyatAM vimuYcatAm
'imaM vi zyAmi varuRasya pASam' (tE0 saM0 1110) vizyAmi vimuYcAmi
'vi pitAputrAvavasyataH' (Sa0 brA0 13244) vyavasyataH pfTagBavataH antaSabdaH pfTaktvamapi brUte yaTA mEtreyIti hovAca yAjYavalkyaH kAtyAyanyA te'ntaM karavARItyatra anto viBAgaH
'aTa te na vyavasyanti praRipAtAya DImataH' (BA0 u0 313) na vyavasyanti nAnumanyante na nirRayanti na niScinvanti
'na vyavasyati pARqUnAM pradAtuM pEtfkaM vasu' (BA0 u0 312) uditacara evArTaH
'kecidenaM vyavasyanti pitAmahasutaM praBum' (BA0 Salya0 4698) vyavasyanti vijAnanti
'BAraM hi raTakArasya na vyavasyanti paRqitAH' (BA0 vi0 494) ukto'rTaH
'yo vicintya DiyA DIro vyavasyati sa budDimAn' (BA0 Adi0 10522) vyavasyati niScinoti
'vyavasya sarvamastIti nAstikyaM BAvamutsfja' (BA0 vana0 3140) vyavasya niScinu lowi rUpam
'satIM tvAmahamatyantaM vyavasyAmyasatIM satIm' (rA0 21276) ukto'rTaH
'pAtuM na praTamaM vyavasyati jalaM yuzmAsvapItezu yA' (SA0 49) na vyavasyati na cintayati na budDO karoti necCati
'kastvetad vyavasedAryastvadanyaH puruzADamaH' (BA0 droRa0 19814) vyavased=vyavasyed=kuryAt
'api vodbanDanAdIni parItAni vyavasyati' (BA0 ASva0 1713) vyavasyati karoti
'taTApi vaktuM vyavasAyayanti mAM nirastanArIsamayA durADayaH' (ki0 118) vyavasAyayanti=udyojayanti
'sADureva sa mantavyaH samyag vyavasito hi saH' (gItA 930) vyavasitaH kftaniScayaH kartari ktaH
'na hyavyavasitaH SatruM rAkzasaM taM viSezataH samarTastvaM raRe hantum…' (rA0 42736).. avyavasito'nudyamI
'SrutvA taTA karizyAmi vyavasAyaM girAM tava' (BA0 vana0 26036) vyavasAyo niScayo'vaDAraRam
'tAta karmaRA kftaniHSezavipriyAH samprati vAcA vyavasyanti' (veRI0 5) vyavasyanti carituM cintayanti tatrArTe kftaniScayAH santi
'sidDaM tu vyavasitAntyatvAt' (pA0 133 sUtre vA0) vyavasitAH paricCinnA DAtutvapratyayatvAdinA DarmeRa
'cirAd vraRo rohati yasya cApi taM snAyuvidDaM puruzaM vyavasyet' (suSruta0 sU0 2520) vyavasyet jAnIyAt niScinuyAt
'viSAlaM Bavati vyavasAyayatyevEnam' (tE0 saM0 ) udyogina karotItyarTaH
'vyavasitapAWaH kartavyaH' (pA0 139 ityatra BAzyam) vyavasitAnAM vicCinnAnAM pAWaH
'anyatopi bahuSo vyavasitacAritrA' (kA0 sU0 156) KaRqitaSIletyarTaH
'fdDamAvasitaM DAnyam ityamaraH' vaserAcCAdanArTakAdapi vyutpAdayanti
'kimaDyavasyanti guravaH' (veRI 1) kiM kartuM niScinvantItyAha
'mA sAhasamaDyavasyaH' (daSaku0 123) mA sAhasaM kartumudyukTAH sAhasaM mA vyavasAsIrityarTaH
'nedavasitAnaDyavasyAnIti' (Sa0 brA0 711) avasTitAnAmupari vasAnItyAha
'aTAraRI pARO kftvA SAlAmaDyavasyati' (Sa0 brA0 31111) aDyavasyati juzate
'kaTamidAnIM durjanavacanAdevamaDyavasitamAryeRa' (uttara0 1) aDyavasitamavaDAritaM niScitam
'BartuH saMnAhasadfSaH SUro'DyavasitaH sutaH' (bf0 Slo0 saM0 565) aDyavasita udyuktaH
'grAmeRADyavasite (SmaSAne) kzetreRa vA nAnaDyAyaH' (Apa0 Da0 1397) grAmatayA svIkfta iti haradattaH grAmeRa nigIrRe iti tu vayam
'vrataM duzkaramaDyavasitam' (hitopa0 1) vyavasitaM parigfhItam
'aDyavasAyo budDiH' (sAM0 ta0 kO0) saMBAvanaM kriyAsu yogyatADyavasAya iti bopadevaH aDyavasAya utprekzaRam
'na svalpamapyaDyavasAyaBIroH karoti vijYAnaniDirguRaM hi' (hitopa0 1) aDyavasAya udyogo yatnaH sAhasam
'budDiraDyavasAnAya sAkzI kzetrajYa ucyate' (BA0 SAM0 28517) aDyavasAnAya vyavasAyArTAya niScayAya
'saMBAvanaM kriyAsu yogyatA'DyavasAnaM SaktiSradDAnam' (33??54 sUtre vfttiH)
'nigIryADyavasAnaM tu prakftasya pareRa yat' (kA0 pra0 10) aDyavasAnaM tAdAtmyApAdanam
'akAryaM kAryavadaDyavasya' (=aDyavasAya) (daSaku0 86) aBimatya cintayitvA
'DarmASrame'DyavasinAM brAhmaRAnAM yuDizWiraH' (BA0 SAM0 646) aTyavasinAM vratopetAnAm
'kartuM smADyavasyati' (Sivapu0 241314) niScinotItyarTaH
'devakzetraM vA ezo'Dyavasyati yaH somasyodgAyati' (jE0 brA0 184) aDyavasyati niyatamApnoti niScitaM vindati
'deveyajanamaDyavasAya' (E0 brA0 720) aDyavasAya niScitya iha ya eza manuzyaH prekzApUrvakArI Bavati sa budDyA tAvat kaYcidarTaM sampaSyati
'sandfzwe prArTanA prArTanAyAmaDyavasAyaH' (pA0 1432 sUtre BAzyam) aDyavasAyo dfQaH prAptisaMkalpaH
'AhitAgniScedupatapet prAcyAmudIcyAmaparAjitAyAM vA diSyudavasyet' (ASva0 gf0 411) udavasyet=nizkramya vaset
'tataScaturzu mAsezvAzAQyAM SrAvaRyAM vodavasAya varuRapraGAsEryajet' (Apa0 SrO0 851) aDyuzitapUrvAd deSAnnirgatyetyarTaH
'udavasAya SAlIna AdaDItAnudavasAya yAyAvaraH' (Apa SrO0 51322) udavasAya viprozya udavasAnaM deSAntaragamanamiti DUrtasvAmI
'jAnIze reBilasyodavasitam' (mfcCa0 4) udavasitaM geham sAMSayikI vyutpattiH syatervA sinotervA vyutpAdyatAm arTasaMgatistu samamasPuwA Bavati
'brAhmaRo banDunA sahodavasyanneva kzatriyatAmaByupEti' (E0 brA0 724) udavasAnIyezwyA somayAgaM samApayannevetyAha
'veSyABavane saBAyAmanyatamasyodavasite vA… AsanabanDo gozWI' (kA0 sU0 1419) udavasitaM gfham
'tEstvA sarvEraBizyAmi pASEH' (aTarva0 4169) aBidaDAmi prasinAmi baDnAmi
'gomayenAlipyAraRyoragnI samArohya pratyavasyati' (Sa0 brA0 12441) pratyavasyati pratinivartate
'tataH SvoBUte gfhezu pratyavasyati' (Apa0 SrO0 91122) sarvatra SvoBUte SvaH praBAte gfhAnpratyAgacCatItyarTaH
'ye pratyavasitAScEva te vE nirayagAminaH' (BA0 anu0 2367) pratyavasitA ArUQapatitA iti nIlakaRWaH
'pravrajyApratyavasitaH prajYASOcayukta udAsTitaH' (kO0 a0 1114) pravrajyApratyavasitaH pravrajito BUtvA punargArhasTyaM pratinivfttaH saMnyAsAtpracyuto BrazwaH
'ye pratyavasitA viprAH pravrajyAdibalAttaTA' (agni pu0 17037)
'yaH pratyavasito vipraH pravrajyAto vinirgataH' (yAjYa0 3280 mitAkzarAyAM parASaravacanam) Brazwa ityevArTaH
'pratyavasitAH sarvalokabahizkftAH' (yama0 Slo0 23) ukto'rTaH
'gatibudDipratyavasAnArTa0' (pA0 1452) iti sUtre pratyavasAnaM BakzaRamAha ayaM cArTo'nyatra vANmaye prAyo na dfzwaH
'soravakzepaRe' (pA0 62195) atra vfttAviha KalvidAnIM susTaRqile susPitAByAM supratyavasita iti sTitam tatra supratyavasita ASitasutfpta ityanarTAntaram

'ABIlAni prARinaH pratyavasyan kAlo nUnaM vyAdadAvAnanAni' (SiSu0 1878) pratyavasyan aByavaharan nigilan grasamAnaH aByavahAraH pratyavasAnaM BojanaM jagDiriti halAyuDaH gatibudDipratyavasAnArTeti sUtre BagavatA pARinA pratyavasAnaSabdo BakzaRArTe prayuktaH sAhitye tu durlaBaH taTApi kavayaH pARqityaprakarzABivyaktaye prayuYjate tatrApyezo' prayuktAnAM balAtprayoge prasiDyatitamAM kavirmAGaH yadvizaya ABaRati lokaH--navasarge gate mAGe navaSabdo na vidyata iti
'mahAsetuH ma Gawito rAjYA nOBiH svasidDaye paryavasyadaviDivaSAcCatrURAM sidDaye punaH' (rAja0 71549).. paryaRamatetyarTaH paryavAsyaditi tUcitam
'eza eva samuccayaH sadyoge'sadyoge sadasadyoge ca paryavasyatIti na pfTag lakzyate' (ka0 pra0 10) samApnoti antaH praviSati
'hA daRqakAraRya vAsapriyasaKi ! lokAntaraM paryavasitAsi' (uttara0 7) gatAsItyarTaH
'so'nyasyEva kftAnukaro'nyasyopAvasAyI Bavati' (Sa0 brA0 16334) parecCAnuvartI BavatItyarTaH paracCando'nupraviSati
'ya enamIjAna upAvasito vA paryavasito vA syAt tasya ninAhyAd (=GawAd) gfhRIyAt' (Sa0 brA0 3928) upAvasita ArAtIyaH paryavasitaH prAtiveSyaH
